name: nestegg

author: Carlo Capocasa
description: A demuxer for the webm audio/video container format, which is a subset of the matroska container format. Wraps the nestegg C library.

releases.d: nestegg, a portable demuxer for the webm audio/video container format, which is a subset of the matroska container format.
